title: Pilosella leptophyton
taxonomy: Pilosella leptophyton is classified as a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family, Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Pilosella, which contains many species of flowering plants. The Pilosella genus is often considered to be a subset of the genus Hieracium. However, some sources may group Pilosella as a separate genus. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe.
